schemes.name: Consortia & Tender Marketing Scheme
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises
schemes.description:
Micro & Small Enterprise in their Individual Capacity faces problems to procure and execute large order, which inhibit and
restrict their growth. NSIC accordingly, adopts Consortia approach and forms consortia of units manufacturing the same
products, thereby easing out marketing problems of MSEs.

schemes.name: Khadi Gramodyog Vikas Yojana: Khadi Vikas Yojana
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises
schemes.description: The scheme aims to increase productivity and wages of Khadi artisans, improve production infrastructure, boost employment and sales, revive traditional rural skills, modernize sales outlets, and promote marketing and exports.

schemes.name: "Marketing Incentive" under the "Handloom Marketing Assistance" Component of the National Handloom Development Programme
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Textiles
schemes.description: The scheme aims to develop and promote marketing channels for handloom products to bring greater visibility to the sector and ensure commensurate remuneration to weavers. It provides Marketing Incentive to eligible handloom agencies for creating conducive conditions for marketing handloom products.

schemes.name: Advance Authorisation(AA)
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Commerce And Industry
schemes.description: Advance Authorisation scheme enables duty free import of inputs for export production, including replenishment of inputs or duty remission Advance Authorisation covers manufacturer exporters or merchant exporters tied to supporting manufacturer(s).

schemes.name: Agri-Clinics And Agri-Business Centres Scheme
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
schemes.description: A welfare scheme by the Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers' Welfare was launched in 2002. AC&ABC aims at agricultural development, supplementing the efforts of public extension by providing extension and other services to farmers either on a payment basis or free of cost as per the business model.

schemes.name: Ambedkar Social Innovation and Incubation Mission (ASIIM)
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemes.description: The scheme aims to boost entrepreneurship and innovation among SC students and SC differently-abled youth by providing focused support to translate innovative, technology-oriented business ideas into successful commercial enterprises. It offers equity funding and hand-holding support.

schemes.name: Assistance to Training Institutions Scheme
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises
schemes.description: Under the scheme, assistance would be provided to the training institutions under the Ministry of MSME for creation, strengthening and expansion of infrastructure, including setting-up of new branches and centres.

schemes.name: Ayush Oushadhi Gunvatta Evam Uttpadan Samvardhan Yojana
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Ayush
schemes.description: The scheme aims to enhance India's manufacturing capabilities and exports of traditional medicines and health promotion products under the initiative of Atmanirbhar Bharat.

schemes.name: Bank Guarantee Charges Reimbursement Scheme
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises
schemes.description: Under the Ministry Of Micro, Small & Medium Enterprises, Bank Guarantee Charges Reimbursement Scheme is a sub scheme under National Scheduled Caste and Scheduled Tribe Hub (NSSH) scheme.

schemes.name: Bank Loan Processing Fee Reimbursement Scheme
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises
schemes.description: The Bank Loan Processing Fee Reimbursement Scheme comes under the purview of the Ministry of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises (MSME) of the Government of India.

schemes.name: Bharat Steel Awards
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Steel
schemes.description: The scheme aims to recognise excellence and outstanding contributions in the Indian steel sector. Through this scheme, awards and incentives are provided to eligible steel companies and individuals.

schemes.name: Biotechnology Ignition Grant Scheme
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Science And Technology
schemes.description: The âBiotechnology Ignition Grant Scheme (BIG)â is a flagship scheme of BIRAC which recognizes and invests in innovative ideas in the biotech sector. BIG scheme supports individual entrepreneurs/ start-ups from ideation to Proof of Concept.

schemes.name: Central Assistance For One Time Settlement Of Displaced Families From PoK And Chhamb Under Prime Minister's Development Package
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Home Affairs
schemes.description: A relief and rehabilitation scheme by the Ministry of Home Affairs provides central assistance to the displaced families from PoK And Chhamb and settled in the state of Jammu & Kashmir. The amount of Central Assistance of Rs. 5,49,692/- per family will be distributed through Direct Benefit Transfer.

schemes.name: Coir Udyami Yojana
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises
schemes.description: The scheme "Coir Udyami Yojana" by the Coir Board, Ministry of MSME, Government of India, aims to modernize the coir industry and generate rural employment. It offers credit-linked financial assistance to establish coir units by eligible applicants.

schemes.name: Coir Vikas Yojana- Coir Industry Technology Upgradation Scheme
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises
schemes.description: The scheme âCoir Industry Technology Upgradation Scheme (CITUS)â is a component of âCoir Vikas Yojanaâ and the scheme was launched by Ministry of Micro, Small & Medium Enterprises, Government of India.

schemes.name: Coir Vikas Yojana- Export Market Promotion Scheme
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises
schemes.description: Coir Board is implementing the Central Sector Scheme âExport Market Promotion Schemeâ with a view to improve the export performance of Indian Coir Sector through various export market promotion activities.

schemes.name: Coir Vikas Yojana-Skill Upgradation and Mahila Coir Yojana
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises
schemes.description: The scheme âSkill Upgradation and Mahila Coir Yojanaâ is a component of âCoir Vikas Yojanaâ and the scheme was launched by the Ministry of Micro, Small & Medium Enterprises, Government of India.

schemes.name: Credit Based Schemes For SC - Term Loan (TL)
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemes.description: A loan scheme by Ministry of Social justice and Empowerment for Entrepreneur of Scheduled Caste Category.

schemes.name: Credit Enhancement Guarantee Scheme For The Scheduled Castes
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemes.description: a loan scheme by the Ministry of Social justice and Empowerment for Entrepreneurs of Scheduled Caste Category.

schemes.name: Credit Guarantee Scheme for Startups
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Commerce And Industry
schemes.description: The GoI established the Credit Guarantee Scheme for Startups with a fixed corpus to provide credit guarantees for loans extended to DPIIT recognised startups by Scheduled Commercial Banks, NBFCs, and Venture Debt Funds (VDFs) under SEBI-registered AlFs.

schemes.name: Design Scheme Under MSME Innovative Scheme
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises
schemes.description: Design scheme will help MSMEs to avail advice on all aspects of design. It helps MSMEs realize and achieve their design-related objectives. This specialist advice will be provided by experienced designers for new product development as well as enhancing existing product portfolio.

schemes.name: Electronic Manufacturing Clusters (EMC) Scheme: Common Facility Centres/ Brownfield Electronics Manufacturing Clusters
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology
schemes.description: The scheme aims to support the upgradation of Brownfield EMCs through Common Facility Centres (CFCs). It provides financial assistance for infrastructure improvement and shared facilities for existing electronics manufacturing units.

schemes.name: Electronic Manufacturing Clusters (EMC) Scheme: Greenfield Electronic Manufacturing Clusters
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology
schemes.description: The aims to promote electronics manufacturing by providing financial assistance for cluster-based infrastructure. Through this scheme, infrastructure support is provided to electronics manufacturing units in identified clusters.

schemes.name: Electronics Component Manufacturing Scheme
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology
schemes.description: The scheme aims to provide financial incentives for manufacturing electronic components in Bharat. Through this scheme, turnover and capital expenditure-linked incentives are provided to companies and Limited Liability Partnerships.

schemes.name: Entrepreneurship and Skill Development Programme
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises
schemes.description: The O/o DC-MSME under "Development of MSMEs" vertical has launched the "Entrepreneurship and Skill Development Programme (ESDP)". The Programme is being organized regularly to nurture the talent of youth by enlightening them on various aspects of industrial/business activity required for setting up

schemes.name: Export Promotion Capital Goods Scheme
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Commerce And Industry
schemes.description: The objective of the EPCG Scheme is to facilitate import of capital goods for producing quality goods and services and enhance Indiaâs manufacturing competitiveness. EPCG scheme allows import of capital goods for pre-production, production and post-production at zero customs duty.

schemes.name: Export Promotion Council Membership Reimbursement Scheme for Scheduled Caste/Scheduled Tribe
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises
schemes.description: Export Promotion Council Membership Reimbursement Scheme provides  reimbursement to an SC/ST Micro & small enterprises(MSEs), on annual membership subscription fee / one-time subscription charges/entry fee charged by various Export Promotion Councils (EPC).

schemes.name: Fund of Funds for Startups
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Commerce And Industry
schemes.description: Launched in January 2016 under Startup India, the Fund of Funds for Startups is managed by SIDBI. It supports DPIIT-recognized startups indirectly by investing in SEBI-registered AIFs, which must invest at least twice the FFS contribution.

schemes.name: GROUP WORKSHED SCHEME
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Textiles
schemes.description: The objective of the scheme is to facilitate the establishment of worksheds for shuttleless looms in an existing or new cluster, which will provide the required scale of economy for business operations.

schemes.name: Incubation Scheme
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises
schemes.description: Incubation Scheme aims to promote and support untapped creativity and to promote adoption of latest technologies in MSMEs that seek the validation of their ideas at the proof-of-concept level.

schemes.name: Industrial R&D Promotion Programme: Recognition Of In-House R&D Units
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Science And Technology
schemes.description: DSIR is operating a scheme called "Recognition of In-House R&D Units" with the objective of granting recognition & registration to in-house R&D units established by the corporate industry. The In-house R&D units are expected to be engaged in innovative research & development activities.

schemes.name: Innovations for Defence Excellence
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Defence
schemes.description: Aimed at creation of an ecosystem to foster innovation and technology development in Defence and Aerospace by engaging Industries (incl MSMEs, start-ups, individual innovators R&D institutes, academia) and provide them grants and other supports to carry out R&D innovation for adoption in D&A Sector

schemes.name: Integrated Scheme for Export Promotion & Quality Improvement in Spices and Research and Development of Cardamom: Export Oriented Production: Large Cardamom Certified Nursery (Unit)
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Commerce And Industry
schemes.description: The scheme "Export Oriented Production: Large Cardamom Certified Nursery (Unit)" is a Sub-Scheme of the Integrated Scheme for Export Promotion & Quality Improvement in Spices and Research and Development of Cardamom by the Spice Board, Department of Commerce and Industry, Ministry of Commerce.

schemes.name: Intellectual Property Right Scheme Under MSME Innovative Scheme
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises
schemes.description: Intellectual Property Right Scheme offers legal and intellectual property filing support including patents, trademarks, copyrights, designs, geographical indications (GI) etc.

schemes.name: International Cooperation Scheme- Capacity Building of First Time MSE Exporters
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises
schemes.description: The scheme âInternational Cooperation Schemeâ was launched by the MSME, Govt. of India with the aim to capacity build MSMEs for entering export market by providing reimbursement of various costs incurred by first time MSE exporters on export shipments.

schemes.name: International Cooperation Scheme- Market Development Assistance
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises
schemes.description: The scheme âInternational Cooperation Schemeâ was launched by the MSME, Govt. of India with the aim to capacity build MSMEs for entering the export market by facilitating their participation in international exhibitions/fairs/conferences/seminars/buyer-seller meets abroad.

schemes.name: Khadi Gramodyog Vikas Yojana: Gramodyog Vikas Yojana
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises
schemes.description: The scheme aims to increase productivity and wages of Khadi artisans, improve production infrastructure, boost employment and sales, revive traditional rural skills, modernize sales outlets, and promote marketing and exports.

schemes.name: Khadi Karigar Janashree Bima Yojana
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises
schemes.description: A group insurance scheme by MoMSME for khadi artisans (spinners and weavers). The scheme provides insurance cover against normal death, accidental death and disability of the insured member.

schemes.name: Loan Based Schemes For Safai Karamchari - General Term Loan (GTL)
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemes.description: A general term loan scheme by the Ministry of Social justice and Empowerment for Safai Karamchari, Manual Scavengers, and their dependants aged 18 years and above.

schemes.name: Loan Based Schemes For Safai Karamchari - Sanitary Marts Scheme
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemes.description: A  contributory Loan scheme by Ministry of Social justice and Empowerment for individual beneficiaries/self help groups of Liberated Safai Karamchari, Manual Scavengers and their dependants aged 18 years and above, for setting up A Sanitary Marts (SM) is a one-stop-shop for all things for sanitation

schemes.name: Loan Based Schemes For Safai Karamchari - Swachhta Udyami Yojana â Swachhta Se Sampannta Ki Aur
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemes.description: A general term loan scheme by the Ministry of Social justice and Empowerment for Safai Karamchari, Manual Scavengers and their dependants aged 18 years and above for procurement of sanitation-related vehicles.

schemes.name: Mahila Samriddhi Yojana
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemes.description: This is a micro-financing programme aiming towards the empowerment of women from underprivileged backgrounds or economically backward areas. Through this scheme, these women can apply for a loan at a nominal interest rate to fulfil their dreams and goals and gain financial independence.
schemes.income_limit: family income is less than Rupees three lakhs per annum

schemes.name: Micro Credit Finance (NSFDC)
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemes.description: The scheme is implemented by the National Scheduled Castes Finance & Development Corporation, Ministry of Social Justice & Empowerment, Govt. of India. Under this scheme, loans are provided to individuals from the SC community for units costing up to â¹1,40,000/- for income-generating activities.
schemes.income_limit: family income should be less than â¹3,00,000/-, both in rural and urban areas w

schemes.name: Modified Market Development Assistance Scheme
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises
schemes.description: The scheme aims to enhance the production and sales of Khadi and Polyvastra products by supporting technology upgradation, market promotion, and providing direct incentives to artisans and Karyakartas. It targets Khadi Institutions and their associated artisans and workers.

schemes.name: MSME Sustainable (ZED) Certification Scheme
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises
schemes.description: MSME Sustainable (ZED) Certification Scheme is an extensive drive to create awareness amongst MSMEs about Zero Defect Zero Effect (ZED) practices and motivate and incentivize them for ZED Cerficaon while also encouraging them to become MSME Champions.

schemes.name: National Apprenticeship Promotion Scheme-2
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Skill Development And Entrepreneurship
schemes.description:
To promote apprenticeship training in the country, by providing partial stipend support
to the apprentices engaged under the Apprentice Act, 1961, undertaking capacity building of the apprenticeship ecosystem, and providing advocacy assistance to the stakeholders.

schemes.name: National Handicrafts Development Programme: Infrastructure And Technology Support: EMPORIA
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Textiles
schemes.description: In the scheme "Infrastructure and Technology Support: EMPORIA" assistance would be provided for the setting up of emporia. These would be set up in commercially viable locations in the implementing agencies' own/rented buildings.

schemes.name: National Handicrafts Development Programme: Infrastructure And Technology Support: URBAN HAAT
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Textiles
schemes.description: The scheme "Infrastructure & Technology Support: URBAN HAAT" is introduced is to set up a permanent marketing infrastructure in towns/ metropolitan cities to provide direct marketing facilities to handicrafts artisans/handloom weavers, enabling them to sell their products to wider target audience.

schemes.name: National Livestock Mission: Establishment of Entrepreneurship for Breed Development of Rural Poultry
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry of Fisheries,Animal Husbandry and Dairying
schemes.description: The scheme aims to promote entrepreneurship in rural poultry farming. Through this scheme, a 50% capital subsidy is provided for establishing Parent Farms, Rural Hatcheries, and Brooder cum Mother Units.

schemes.name: National Livestock Mission: Genetic Improvement of Pig breeds - Establishment of Pig Semen Collection and Processing Lab
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry of Fisheries,Animal Husbandry and Dairying
schemes.description: The Scheme aims to enhance per-animal productivity, reduce inbreeding, and minimize sexually transmitted diseases in pigs. Through this scheme, financial assistance is provided for establishing semen processing labs at government pig farms.

schemes.name: National Livestock Mission: Genetic Improvement of Pig Breeds - Import of Exotic Pig Germplasm
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry of Fisheries,Animal Husbandry and Dairying
schemes.description: The scheme aims to enhance indigenous pig productivity through genetic upgradation. The scheme supports the establishment of pig semen collection and processing labs and the import of exotic pig germplasm.

schemes.name: National Livestock Mission: Promotion of Piggery Entrepreneur
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry of Fisheries,Animal Husbandry and Dairying
schemes.description: The scheme aims to promote entrepreneurship in pig farming by providing a one-time capital subsidy of up to â¹30 lakh to eligible entrepreneurs and organizations to establish breeder farms.

schemes.name: National Startup Awards
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Commerce And Industry
schemes.description: The National Startup Awards by Startup India aims to recognize and reward outstanding startups and ecosystem enablers building innovative products or solutions and scalable enterprises.

schemes.name: New Swarnima Scheme For Women
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemes.description: A term loan scheme by the Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment for women entrepreneurs from backward classes to obtain a loan of up to â¹2,00,000/- @ 5% per annum, thereby providing them social & financial security.
schemes.income_limit: Family Income** of the Applicant must be Less than **â¹ 3 Lakh per Annum**

schemes.name: Northeast BPO Promotion Scheme
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology
schemes.description: The scheme aims to promote the establishment of BPO and Information Technology Enabled Services units in the North-Eastern region. Through the scheme, financial assistance in the form of Viability Gap Funding is provided to eligible companies.

schemes.name: PM Street Vendorâs AtmaNirbhar Nidhi (PM SVANidhi)
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Housing & Urban Affairs
schemes.description: PM SVANidhi is a micro-credit scheme launched on 1st June 2020 by the MoHUA to provide handholding support to street vendors. The scheme facilitates a working capital collateral-free loan of â¹10,000, with subsequent loans of â¹20,000 and â¹50,000 with a 7% interest subsidy.

schemes.name: PM Vishwakarma
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises
schemes.description: The scheme "PM Vishwakarma " by the Ministry of Micro, Small & Medium Enterprises, is a new scheme that envisages providing end-to-end holistic support to traditional artisans and craftspeople in scaling up their conventional products and services.

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Bhartiya Janaushadhi Pariyojana
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Chemicals And Fertilizers
schemes.description: Pradhan Mantri Bhartiya Janaushadhi Pariyojana was launched by the Department of Pharmaceuticals, in November 2008. Under the scheme, dedicated outlets known as Janaushadhi Kendras are opened to make quality generic medicines available to all at affordable prices.

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Formalisation Of Micro Food Processing Enterprises
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry of Food Processing Industries
schemes.description: Launched on 29th June 2020, PMFMPE is a Centrally Sponsored Scheme by the MoFPI, designed to address the challenges faced by the micro enterprises and to tap the potential of groups and cooperatives in supporting the upgradation and formalization of these enterprises.

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Kaushal Vikas Yojana - Short Term Training
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Skill Development And Entrepreneurship
schemes.description: A skill development scheme by Ministry of Skill Development and Entrepreneurship for school/college dropouts/unemployed aged 15-45 at PMKVY Training Centres (TCs).

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Kaushal Vikas Yojana - Special Projects
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Skill Development And Entrepreneurship
schemes.description: A skill development scheme by Ministry of Skill Development and Entrepreneurship for Marginalized or vulnerable groups which may not meet all the parameters as laid down in the Guidelines of ShortTerm Training (STT) of PMKVY 3.0

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Matsya Kisan Samridhi Sah-yojana (PM-MKSSY): COMPONENT 1A: Formalization of Fisheries Sector and Facilitating Access of Fisheries Microenterprises to Government of India Programs for Working Capital Financing
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry of Fisheries,Animal Husbandry and Dairying
schemes.description: The scheme aims to formalise fisheries microenterprises and facilitate their access to institutional working capital finance through small grants and credit intermediaries. It benefits fisheries sector stakeholders registered on NFDP with verifiable credit needs and valid bank accounts.

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Virasat ka Samvardhan
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Minority Affairs
schemes.description: PM VIKAS is a Central sector scheme that focuses on socio-economic empowerment of six notified minorities in the country through skilling & training, women leadership & empowerment and education. The scheme integrates erstwhile skilling & education schemes of the Ministry of Minority Affairs.

schemes.name: Prime Minister's Employment Generation Programme
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises
schemes.description: Launched in August 2008, Prime Minister's Employment Generation Programme (PMEGP) is a credit-linked subsidy scheme, administered by the Ministry of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises (MSME). PMEGP aims to generate employment opportunities through the establishment of micro-enterprises in

schemes.name: PRISM (Promoting Innovations in Individuals, Start-ups and MSMEs): Category-1: Proof of Concept/ Prototypes/ Models
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Science And Technology
schemes.description: The scheme aims to support individual innovators which will enable them to achieve the agenda of inclusive development - one of the thrust areas of the XIIth five-year plan (2012-2017). The proposals shall preferably be considered in the following focus sectors: Green technology, Clean energy, etc.

schemes.name: PRISM (Promoting Innovations in Individuals, Start-ups and MSMEs): Category-2: Fabrication of Working Model/Process Know-how/Testing & Trial/Patenting/Technology Transfer
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Science And Technology
schemes.description: The scheme aims to promote innovations in individuals, start-ups, and Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises (PRISM). It offers financial support (up to â¹20,00,000/-) for Indian Citizens working on innovation projects requiring fabrication of working models, patenting, or technology transfer.

schemes.name: Production Linked Incentive (PLI) Scheme for Pharmaceuticals
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Chemicals And Fertilizers
schemes.description: The scheme provides financial incentives on the incremental sales (over Base Year) of pharmaceutical goods and in-vitro diagnostic medical devices to selected applicants based on pre-defined selection criteria. The applicant must be a manufacturer of pharmaceutical goods.

schemes.name: Production Linked Incentive (PLI) Scheme for White Goods (Air Conditioners and LED Lights)
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Commerce And Industry
schemes.description: The scheme targets manufacturers of components / sub-assemblies of Air Conditioners & LED Lights and offers 4â6% incentive on incremental sales to boost localization, reduce imports, and build a domestic supply chain.

schemes.name: Production Linked Incentive Scheme For Automobile And Auto Component Industry
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry of Heavy Industries
schemes.description: The government of India has launched the scheme âProduction Linked Incentive (PLI) Scheme for Automobile and Auto Components Industryâ in India to enhance Indiaâs Manufacturing Capabilities for Advanced Automotive Products.

schemes.name: Reimbursement of membership Fee in Government promoted E-Commerce Portals
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises
schemes.description: Reimbursement of Membership fee of Government promoted e-commerce portals Scheme is a sub scheme under National Scheduled Caste and Scheduled Tribe Hub (NSSH) scheme.

schemes.name: Samriddhi â Scheme for Scheduled Caste/Scheduled Tribe Students for Setting Start-Ups
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry of Education
schemes.description: The scheme aims to provide opportunities for Scheduled Caste/Scheduled Tribe students to design, launch, and run their own business or startup after formal education is completed or during their final year of education. The scheme provides a limited one-time financial assistance of â¹20,00,000/-.

schemes.name: Scheme for Plantation Development (New planting & Replanting) under Medium Term Framework Plan (MTFP) in Traditional Areas (Kerala and Tamil Nadu), Non-Traditional and North Eastern Region
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Commerce And Industry
schemes.description: The Scheme is intended to increase the production of natural rubber in India by accelerating new planting and replanting of rubber on scientific lines. Accelerated new planting/replanting would be achieved by giving proper technical guidance and financial assistance to growers.

schemes.name: Scheme for Reimbursement of Testing and Certification Charges for Start-ups and Telecom MSEs
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology
schemes.description: The scheme aims to reimburse testing and certification costs. Financial support is provided to Start-ups and MSEs to enhance telecom product competitiveness.

schemes.name: Scheme of Assistance to State Scheduled Castes Development Corporations
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemes.description: The scheme aims to provide economic development assistance to Scheduled Castes living below the poverty line through financial support and credit facilitation. It provides share capital, margin money loans, and subsidies to Scheduled Castes families for employment-oriented schemes.

schemes.name: Scheme of Fund for Regeneration of Traditional Industries
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises
schemes.description: To make the traditional industries more productive and competitive and facilitating their sustainable development, the Govt. of India announced in 2005-06, setting up of a fund for the regeneration of traditional industries. Pursuant to this announcement, a Central Sector Scheme titled the âSFURTI".

schemes.name: SITARE-Gandhian Young Technological Innovation Award Grant
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Science And Technology
schemes.description: Under SITARE-GYTI scheme component, 15 innovative student projects will receive funding support of upto INR 15 lakhs each. The scheme encourages postgraduate & doctoral students to undertake projects with commercial potential leading to the creation of biotech startups.

schemes.name: Skill Development and Training of Candidates in Technical Textiles
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Textiles
schemes.description: The scheme aims to train skilled professionals for the technical textiles industry, develop transferable skills, create a strong knowledge ecosystem, integrate trained individuals into various roles, and promote continuous learning and innovation.

schemes.name: Special Credit Linked Capital Subsidy Scheme (SCLCSS) for Scheduled Caste/Scheduled Tribe
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises
schemes.description: Special Credit Linked Capital Subsidy Scheme (SCLCSS) for Scheduled Caste / Scheduled scheme aims to facilitate capital subsidy to SC/ST MSEs for purchasing of plant & machinery/equipment through institutional finance (bank loan).

schemes.name: Stand-Up India
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Finance
schemes.description: A scheme by Ministry of Finance for financing SC/ST and  Women Entrepreneurs by facilitating bank loans for setting up a greenfield project  Enterprise in manufacturing, services, trading sector and activities allied to agriculture.

schemes.name: Startup India Seed Fund Scheme- For Incubators
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Commerce And Industry
schemes.description: The scheme âStartup India Seed Fund Scheme (SISFS)â was launched by the DPIIT on 19th April 2021 to provide financial assistance to startups for proof of concept, prototype development, product trials, market-entry, and commercialization.

schemes.name: Startup India Seed Fund Scheme- For Startups
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Commerce And Industry
schemes.description: The scheme âStartup India Seed Fund Scheme (SISFS)â was launched by the DPIIT on 19th April 2021 with an outlay of INR 945 Crore to provide financial assistance to startups for Proof of Concept, prototype development, product trials, market-entry, and commercialization.

schemes.name: Sub-mission on Breed Development of Livestock and Poultry
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry of Fisheries,Animal Husbandry and Dairying
schemes.description: The Department of Animal Husbandry & Dairying introduced the National Livestock Mission as umbrella scheme. The "Sub-mission on Breed Development of Livestock and Poultry" is the realigned National Livestock Mission, which is the scheme's sub-mission.

schemes.name: Technology Development Fund (TDF) Scheme
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Defence
schemes.description: Technology Development Fund (TDF) has been established to promote self-reliance in Defence Technology as a part of the 'Make in India' initiative.

schemes.name: Telecom Technology Development Fund
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Communication
schemes.description:
The Telecom Technology Development Fund Scheme (hereinafter referred to as âSchemeâ) has been
notified for domestic companies and institutions involved in technology design, development,
commercialization of telecommunication products and solutions to enable affordable broadband and mobile services.

schemes.name: Testing Fee Reimbursement Scheme
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises
schemes.description: Testing Fee Reimbursement Scheme for Scheduled Caste / Scheduled Tribe is a sub scheme under National Scheduled Caste and Scheduled Tribe Hub (NSSH) scheme.

schemes.name: Uttar Poorva Transformative Industrialization Scheme
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Commerce And Industry
schemes.description: The UNNATI (Uttar Poorva Transformative Industrialization Scheme), 2024, is a Government of India initiative for Northeastern region of India offering various incentives to the industries in both sectors Manufacturing and Service.

schemes.name: Venture Capital Fund for Scheduled Castes
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemes.description: The scheme aims to promote entrepreneurship among Scheduled Caste individuals by providing concessional finance. Benefits include investment ranging from â¹10,00,000/- to â¹15,00,00,000/- as debt or equity for eligible Private Limited or Public Limited companies.
